title: Gothofreda obliquifolia

It is native to Central and South America, where it is found growing in tropical and subtropical regions. The exact classification of Gothofreda obliquifolia is not well-documented, but it is believed to be a member of the genus Gothofreda, which is part of the larger family Sapindaceae.
